title: Hypixel Streamer Mode
description: A "Simple" mod to hide server id and usernames on Hypixel
body:
# Hypixel Streamer Mode

A Fabric mod designed for streamers and content creators playing on Hypixel. Protect your privacy by hiding information like your username, server IDs, and other players' names in chat, tab list, nametags, and scoreboard.

## Features

- **Hide Your Name** - Replace your username with a custom name (e.g., "User") across chat, tab list, nametags, and scoreboard
- **Hide Other Players** - Anonymize other players' names (Player01, Player02, etc.)
- **Hide Server IDs** - Automatically hide server identifiers like `mini123A`, `mega456B`, `m101BC`
- **Blacklist System** - Add specific words to automatically hide any player whose name contains them
- **Custom Formatting** - Configure your replacement name and the format for other players' names
- **GUI** - Easy-to-use in-game configuration screen

## Usage

Open the settings GUI by pressing `\`. From there you can:

- **Enable/Disable** the mod
- **Hide Name** - Toggle hiding your own username
- **Hide Others** - Toggle hiding all other players' names
- **Hide Server ID** - Toggle hiding server identifiers
- **Your Name** - Set what your name gets replaced with
- **Others Format** - Set the format for other players
- **Blacklist** - Add words to auto-hide matching player names

## Supported Versions

| Minecraft Version | Status |
|-------------------|--------|
| 1.21.5 | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.9 | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.10 | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.11 | ✅ Supported |

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
- Fabric API
